news.t: FINQ Reports Since-Inception Performance for AIUP and AINT AI-Managed ETFs
Fund Manager FINQ Lets AI Run US ETFs
Israel's FINQ launches US ETFs managed solely by AI

overview.description: The FINQ DOLLAR NEUTRAL U.S. Large Cap AI-Managed Equity ETF (AINT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long/short alternatives. The fund is an actively managed ETF that uses a dollar-neutral investing approach based on an adaptive artificial intelligence framework. The fund establishes long and short positions in equity securities of large-cap US companies. AINT was launched on Feb 5, 2026 and is issued by FINQ.

data.text: NEW YORK, May 04, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- FINQ today reported performance since inception for its FINQ FIRST U.S. Large Cap AI-Managed Equity ETF (AIUP) and FINQ Dollar Neutral U.S. Large Cap AI-Mana...

data.title: Fund Manager FINQ Lets AI Run US ETFs
data.text: Fund manager FINQ has launched two U.S. exchange-traded funds (ETFs) in which the firm's artificial intelligence (AI) model selects, designs and manages the portfolio, Reuters reported Tuesday (Feb. 1...

data.title: Israel's FINQ launches US ETFs managed solely by AI
data.text: Israel fund manager FINQ said on Tuesday it was entering the U.S. Exchange-Traded Funds market with two funds that will be solely managed by artificial intelligence, a nascent sub-sector where so far ...
